_meta.method: Manual transitive trace of src/app/(app)/dashboard/page.tsx imports + SuperDashboardClient.tsx render tree. Each widget file opened and visible hard-coded English strings catalogued. Strings already translated (Header/RevenueHub/WelcomeBanner/WelcomeTour/QuickActions/TodaysFocus subset) are marked current_render_lang='ru' and excluded from target_ru_value when unchanged.

discovered_issues_for_reviewer: [RESOLVED §6.1] DEAD CODE: src/app/(app)/dashboard/DashboardClientWrapper.tsx is NOT imported anywhere → IGNORE, flag in backlog (backlog_dashboard_wrapper_dead_code.md).
[RESOLVED §6.2] SCOPE: briefing/ + command-center/ routes → SEPARATE tasks CP-A.briefing, CP-A.commandcenter. NOT in CP-A redo.
[RESOLVED §6.3] SHARED FORMATTER MISSING → APPROVED direction: src/lib/format/currency.ts. Awaiting Q-Ramiz-1 for symbol position.
[RESOLVED §6.4] DYNAMIC API STRINGS → IN SCOPE with amendment §2 (linkLabelKey enum). Implementation in plan §4.3.
[RESOLVED §6.5] SHARED CLIENT STATUS ENUM → APPROVED: namespace under client.status.* in messages/. No new TS type.
_meta.drift_investigation_summary: Root cause: stale Supabase refresh token in Playwright test session, NOT product code. Zero commits on src/app/(app)/dashboard/ between Step 2 (17:50) and Step 3 (18:19). FreelanceHealthScore / ChurnRisk / ClientHealthGrid use client-side supabase.auth.getUser() and return null on auth fail. Real users unaffected. CP-A scope unchanged.

ramiz_decisions.Q-Ramiz-1_currency_symbol_position: RESOLVED — Option A native Russian. Format: '1,2 тыс. $' (Intl.NumberFormat ru-RU + currencyDisplay narrowSymbol). Matches Tinkoff/Sber/Bitrix24/AmoCRM.
ramiz_decisions.Q-Ramiz-2_activity_time_threshold: RESOLVED — Option B. Logic: <60 → '{N} мин'; ≥60 → '{H} ч' if no remainder, else '{H} ч {M} мин'. Hour plural via ICU PluralRules. Matches Toggl/Harvest/Clockify.
ramiz_decisions.Q-Ramiz-3_sunrise_sunset_icons: RESOLVED — Option A defer to Phase 8. CP-A keeps Sun (5-17) + Moon (18-04). Backlog file: backlog_phase8_greeting_icons.md.

out_of_scope_for_cp_a_redo: Activity feed item.description text — generated server-side by /api/dashboard/super, contains 'Invoice INV-002 draft', 'Logged 480m: untitled' etc. Needs locale-aware API. Flag for explicit reviewer decision: separate task ОР include in scope?
Currency notation (Intl.NumberFormat 'en' locale hardcoded inside several widgets like ClientHealthGrid line 105). Affects $1.2k display vs ru-RU formatting
